summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The shard has no shared canonical, all hydrated items are open pull requests, and the preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive items. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned because this inventory is not a dedupe cluster and low-signal/fix/merge paths are disabled by job frontmatter.
